narrative:
Ousmane Dembélé is a Centre-Forward for France, currently holding an impressive overall rating of 7.71/10. This places him in the top 1% of centre-forwards at this tournament, highlighting his elite status. His rating range is 7.33–8.09, reflecting the match sample size.

At this World Cup, Dembélé demonstrates remarkable efficiency, scoring 0.968 goals per 90 minutes from an expected goals (xG) of 0.309 per 90 minutes. He also contributes significantly with 0.484 assists per 90 minutes, far exceeding his expected assists (xA) of 0.188 per 90 minutes. Furthermore, his 2.661 key passes per 90 minutes underline his creative impact on the French attack.

Dembélé is clearly a pivotal attacking force for France, delivering exceptional output in front of goal and in creation. Scouts and fans should continue to watch for his clinical finishing, given his high goals per 90 from relatively lower xG. His ability to consistently produce both goals and assists will be crucial for France's tournament progression.
